description: Compares two values by reference, returns [[true]] if not equal.
examples:
<sqf>
_arr1 = [1,[2,[3]]];
_arr2 = _arr1;
_arr1 isEqualTo _arr2;		// true
_arr1 isNotEqualRef _arr2;	// false

_arr2 = +_arr1;				// array copy
_arr1 isEqualTo _arr2;		// true
_arr1 isNotEqualRef _arr2;	// true
</sqf>
name: isNotEqualRef
